examples.target: I need to {catch up} on the work I missed.
She ran faster to {catch up} with her friend.
examples.source: Arkadaşına yetişmek için daha hızlı koştu.

examples.target: Let's {catch up} over coffee this weekend.
examples.source: Bu hafta sonu kahve içerken sohbet edelim.

examples.target: He stayed late to {catch up} with his assignments.
We need to {check in} at the hotel by 3 PM.
examples.source: Otele saat 15.00'a kadar giriş yapmamız gerekiyor.

examples.target: Please {check in} online before your flight.
examples.source: Uçuşunuzdan önce lütfen çevrimiçi check-in yapın.

examples.target: The manager will {check in} with the team tomorrow.
She called to {check in} and see how I was doing.
Can you {come up with} a better solution?
examples.source: Daha iyi bir çözüm bulabilir misin?

examples.target: She {came up with} a creative idea for the project.
examples.source: Proje için yaratıcı bir fikir buldu.

examples.target: We need to {come up with} a plan quickly.
examples.source: Hızla bir plan ortaya çıkarmamız gerekiyor.

examples.target: He couldn't {come up with} the right answer.
Can you {drop off} the kids at school?
Sales {dropped off} sharply last quarter.
examples.source: Satışlar geçen çeyrekte keskin biçimde düştü.

examples.target: She {dropped off} the package at the post office.
Attendance tends to {drop off} after the holidays.
Don't {fall behind} on your payments.
He started to {fall behind} in his studies.
The team {fell behind} in the second half.
She didn't want to {fall behind} her classmates.
Do you {get along} with your coworkers?
The two children {get along} very well.
examples.source: İki çocuk birbirleriyle çok iyi geçiniyor.

examples.target: It's important to {get along} with your neighbors.
They didn't {get along} at first but became friends.
examples.source: Başta iyi anlaşamadılar ama sonra arkadaş oldular.

examples.target: Please {hand in} your assignment by Friday.
examples.source: Lütfen ödevinizi Cuma gününe kadar teslim edin.

examples.target: He {handed in} his resignation letter.
Students must {hand in} their reports on time.
She forgot to {hand in} the form.
I'll {look up} the word in the dictionary.
Things are starting to {look up} for our team.
She {looked up} from her book when I entered.
Can you {look up} his phone number?
Can you {pick up} some milk on the way home?
examples.source: Eve gelirken biraz süt alabilir misin?

examples.target: She {picked up} Spanish quickly.
He {picked up} the phone and called her.
Business is starting to {pick up} again.
She {pointed out} the mistakes in my essay.
He {pointed out} the location on the map.
I should {point out} that this is not my fault.
The teacher {pointed out} the key concepts.
We need to {sort out} this problem.
She {sorted out} the paperwork efficiently.
Can you {sort out} the meeting schedule?
They {sorted out} their differences.
Please {speak up}; I can't hear you.
examples.source: Lütfen daha yüksek sesle konuş; seni duymuyorum.

examples.target: Don't be afraid to {speak up} in meetings.
She {spoke up} against the unfair policy.
If you disagree, you should {speak up}.
What does this abbreviation {stand for}?
She {stands for} equality and justice.
I won't {stand for} this kind of behavior.
The flag {stands for} national unity.
She decided to {take up} painting.
This furniture {takes up} too much space.
examples.source: Bu mobilya çok fazla yer kaplıyor.

examples.target: He {took up} jogging to stay fit.
The project {took up} all his time.
Everything will {work out} in the end.
She {works out} at the gym every morning.
examples.source: Her sabah spor salonunda antrenman yapıyor.

examples.target: Can you {work out} the total cost?
Their plan didn't {work out} as expected.
Do you have {access} to the database?
The building has {access} for wheelchair users.
examples.source: Binada tekerlekli sandalye kullanıcıları için giriş var.

examples.target: Internet {access} is available in all rooms.
She gained {access} to restricted files.
What's on the {agenda} for today?
The meeting {agenda} was sent in advance.
She has her own political {agenda}.
Environmental issues topped the {agenda}.
They signed a trade {agreement}.
There is general {agreement} on this issue.
examples.source: Bu konuda genel bir uzlaşma var.

examples.target: The {agreement} was reached after long negotiations.
Both sides must honor the {agreement}.
examples.source: Her iki taraf da anlaşmaya uymalıdır.

examples.target: She struggled to maintain her {balance}.
What's the current {balance} in my account?
A healthy {balance} between work and rest is vital.
examples.source: İş ve dinlenme arasında sağlıklı bir denge hayati önem taşır.

examples.target: The {balance} of power shifted in the region.
The {chart} shows monthly sales data.
She presented a {chart} during her speech.
This {chart} tracks temperature changes.
The pie {chart} was easy to understand.
There is fierce {competition} in this market.
examples.source: Bu piyasada şiddetli bir rekabet var.

examples.target: She won the singing {competition}.
Healthy {competition} drives innovation.
The {competition} for university places is intense.
Read the word in {context} to understand it.
Her remarks were taken out of {context}.
In this {context}, the decision makes sense.
Understanding cultural {context} is important.
There is a clear {contrast} between the two styles.
examples.source: İki tarz arasında belirgin bir zıtlık var.

examples.target: The {contrast} of colors makes the painting vivid.
In {contrast} to his brother, he is very quiet.
examples.source: Erkek kardeşinin aksine o çok sakin.

examples.target: The {contrast} between rich and poor is stark.
examples.source: Zengin ve yoksul arasındaki zıtlık çarpıcı.

examples.target: Exercise is the {core} of a healthy lifestyle.
The {core} of the problem is lack of communication.
She removed the {core} of the apple.
This is a {core} skill for the job.
examples.source: Bu, iş için temel bir beceridir.

examples.target: This {device} can measure blood pressure.
She left her {device} at home.
The new {device} is easy to use.
A tracking {device} was installed in the car.
Trust is the {foundation} of a strong relationship.
The {foundation} of the building was cracked.
She donated to a children's {foundation}.
Math is the {foundation} of science.
The law had a positive {impact} on society.
examples.source: Yasa toplum üzerinde olumlu bir etki yarattı.

examples.target: The {impact} of the crash damaged the car.
What is the {impact} of social media on youth?
examples.source: Sosyal medyanın gençlik üzerindeki etkisi nedir?

examples.target: Climate change has a global {impact}.
examples.source: İklim değişikliğinin küresel bir etkisi var.

examples.target: Add another {layer} of paint.
The cake has three {layer}s of cream.
The atmosphere has several {layer}s.
Each {layer} of the problem was carefully analyzed.
Leave a {margin} on both sides of the page.
examples.source: Sayfanın her iki tarafında kenar boşluğu bırakın.

examples.target: They won by a narrow {margin}.
The profit {margin} was higher this year.
examples.source: Bu yıl kâr payı daha yüksekti.

examples.target: Write your notes in the {margin}.
She built a strong professional {network}.
The computer is connected to the {network}.
A {network} of roads connects the cities.
examples.source: Şehirleri bir yol ağı birbirine bağlıyor.

examples.target: He used his {network} to find a job.
The {acid} damaged the metal surface.
Stomach {acid} helps digest food.
examples.source: Mide asidi yiyeceklerin sindirilmesine yardımcı olur.

examples.target: Lemon juice contains citric {acid}.
The scientist tested the {acid} concentration.
examples.source: Bilim insanı asit konsantrasyonunu test etti.

examples.target: Everything is made of {atom}s.
An {atom} consists of protons and electrons.
examples.source: Bir atom proton ve elektronlardan oluşur.

examples.target: The {atom} is the basic unit of matter.
Scientists split the {atom} in the experiment.
The storm cut off the {electricity}.
{Electricity} powers most modern devices.
examples.source: Elektrik çoğu modern cihaza güç sağlar.

examples.target: The bill for {electricity} was very high.
Wind turbines generate {electricity}.
An {enzyme} speeds up chemical reactions.
This {enzyme} breaks down fat.
The {enzyme} is produced in the liver.
Scientists discovered a new {enzyme} last year.
examples.source: Bilim insanları geçen yıl yeni bir enzim keşfetti.

examples.target: This trait is controlled by a single {gene}.
examples.source: Bu özellik tek bir gen tarafından kontrol edilir.

examples.target: Scientists identified the {gene} responsible for the disease.
examples.source: Bilim insanları hastalıktan sorumlu geni tespit etti.

examples.target: She inherited the {gene} from her mother.
{Gene} therapy is a promising treatment.
examples.source: Gen terapisi umut verici bir tedavidir.

examples.target: The surgeon used a {laser} to remove the tumor.
examples.source: Cerrah tümörü çıkarmak için lazer kullandı.

examples.target: A {laser} beam can cut through steel.
He used a {laser} pointer during the presentation.
{Laser} technology has many applications.
examples.source: Lazer teknolojisinin pek çok uygulaması vardır.

examples.target: Water is a simple {molecule}.
A {molecule} consists of two or more atoms.
examples.source: Bir molekül iki veya daha fazla atomdan oluşur.

examples.target: The {molecule} was analyzed under a microscope.
DNA is a large and complex {molecule}.
examples.source: DNA büyük ve karmaşık bir moleküldür.

examples.target: The {nucleus} of an atom contains protons.
The cell {nucleus} holds the genetic material.
Science class studied the atomic {nucleus}.
The {nucleus} is the center of the cell.
The plant was damaged by {radiation}.
Solar {radiation} can cause sunburn.
{Radiation} therapy is used to treat cancer.
examples.source: Radyasyon terapisi kanseri tedavi etmek için kullanılır.

examples.target: Workers wore protective suits against {radiation}.
examples.source: Çalışanlar radyasyona karşı koruyucu giysiler giydiler.

examples.target: The satellite is in {orbit} around Earth.
The planet completed one {orbit} in 365 days.
The space station travels in low {orbit}.
examples.source: Uzay istasyonu alçak yörüngede seyahat eder.

examples.target: Scientists calculated the {orbit} of the asteroid.
The {surface} of Mars is covered in red dust.
She polished the {surface} of the table.
There are many scratches on the {surface}.
The {surface} temperature was extremely hot.
There was {tension} in the room during the debate.
Political {tension} increased between the countries.
The {tension} in the rope caused it to snap.
She felt the {tension} leave her body after yoga.
examples.source: Yoga sonrası gerginliğin vücudundan gittiğini hissetti.

examples.target: The {volume} of the container is 2 liters.
Turn down the {volume} please.
The {volume} of traffic increased at rush hour.
Calculate the {volume} of the sphere.
Scientists created a {clone} of the sheep.
A {clone} is genetically identical to the original.
The {clone} of the plant was healthy.
Many believe {clone}ing humans is unethical.
examples.source: Pek çok kişi insan klonlamanın etik olmadığına inanır.

examples.target: The {formula} for water is H₂O.
She used the {formula} to calculate the result.
They developed a new {formula} for the drug.
examples.source: İlaç için yeni bir formül geliştirdiler.

examples.target: The {formula} for success is hard work.
She showed {affection} by hugging her daughter.
He has a deep {affection} for animals.
The children craved {affection} and attention.
examples.source: Çocuklar sevgi ve ilgiye can atıyordu.

examples.target: His {affection} for her never faded.
The {bond} between siblings is very strong.
They formed a close {bond} during the trip.
examples.source: Gezi sırasında yakın bir bağ kurdular.

examples.target: The {bond} of friendship lasted decades.
A shared experience can create a strong {bond}.
examples.source: Ortak bir deneyim güçlü bir bağ yaratabilir.

examples.target: They announced their {divorce} last year.
The {divorce} affected the children deeply.
She filed for {divorce} after ten years of marriage.
examples.source: On yıllık evlilikten sonra boşanma davası açtı.

examples.target: The {divorce} rate has risen in recent years.
This story has been passed down through {generation}s.
My {generation} grew up without smartphones.
examples.source: Benim neslim akıllı telefon olmadan büyüdü.

examples.target: Each {generation} faces unique challenges.
examples.source: Her nesil kendine özgü zorluklarla karşılaşır.

examples.target: A {generation} gap exists between parents and teens.
examples.source: Ebeveynler ile gençler arasında nesil uçurumu var.

examples.target: Office {gossip} spread quickly.
She doesn't like to spread {gossip}.
The {gossip} about the celebrity was untrue.
He dismissed the {gossip} without concern.
She was respected by her {peer}s.
{Peer} pressure can influence behavior.
The study was reviewed by {peer}s.
He struggled to fit in with his {peer}s.
The two companies are fierce {rival}s.
He defeated his {rival} in the final match.
They turned a {rival} into an ally.
Her greatest {rival} motivated her to improve.
examples.source: En büyük rakibi onu gelişmeye motive etti.

examples.target: Their {romance} began in college.
He planned a {romance}d evening for her.
examples.source: Onun için romantik bir akşam planladı.

examples.target: The novel is a classic {romance} story.
They kept their {romance} secret for months.
Do you have any {sibling}s?
Her {sibling} lives abroad.
{Sibling} rivalry is common in families.
He is the youngest {sibling} in the family.
{Trust} is the foundation of any relationship.
She lost her {trust} in him after the lie.
examples.source: Yalan sonrası ona olan güvenini yitirdi.

examples.target: It takes time to build {trust}.
They placed their {trust} in the new leader.
The team showed great {unity} during the crisis.
examples.source: Takım kriz sırasında büyük bir birlik sergiledi.

examples.target: National {unity} is essential during difficult times.
The song was a symbol of {unity}.
They achieved their goal through {unity}.
They exchanged {vow}s at the wedding.
He made a {vow} to never lie again.
examples.source: Bir daha asla yalan söylememek için yemin etti.

examples.target: She kept her {vow} of silence.
The monk took a {vow} of poverty.
She showed great {empathy} for the victims.
{Empathy} helps us understand others' feelings.
examples.source: Empati, başkalarının duygularını anlamamıza yardımcı olur.

examples.target: He lacked {empathy} in his responses.
Teaching children {empathy} is important.
His {loyalty} to the team never wavered.
Customer {loyalty} is key to business success.
She proved her {loyalty} under pressure.
{Loyalty} programs reward repeat customers.
{Jealousy} can destroy a friendship.
He felt a pang of {jealousy} at her success.
{Jealousy} often comes from insecurity.
She hid her {jealousy} behind a smile.
She made a {bold} decision to quit her job.
examples.source: İşinden ayrılmak için cesur bir karar aldı.

examples.target: The {bold} design attracted many customers.
examples.source: Göz alıcı tasarım pek çok müşteriyi çekti.

examples.target: He gave a {bold} speech at the conference.
The {bold} colors stood out on the canvas.
examples.source: Kalın renkler tuval üzerinde öne çıktı.

examples.target: The {daring} explorer crossed the desert alone.
examples.source: Gözü pek kaşif çölü yalnız başına geçti.

examples.target: It was a {daring} plan that surprised everyone.
She wore a {daring} outfit to the party.
His {daring} rescue saved three lives.
examples.source: Gözü pek kurtarması üç can kurtardı.

examples.target: She found a {decent} job after months of searching.
examples.source: Aylarca araştırdıktan sonra düzgün bir iş buldu.

examples.target: That was a {decent} meal for the price.
examples.source: Fiyatına göre gayet makul bir yemekti.

examples.target: Please dress in a {decent} manner.
He is a {decent} and honest man.
He has been a {faithful} employee for 20 years.
The dog was {faithful} to its owner.
She remained {faithful} to her principles.
A {faithful} translation keeps the original meaning.
examples.source: Sadık bir çeviri orijinal anlamı korur.

examples.target: There was {fierce} competition for the prize.
examples.source: Ödül için şiddetli bir rekabet vardı.

examples.target: The lion gave a {fierce} roar.
She is a {fierce} defender of human rights.
The {fierce} storm destroyed the crops.
She has a {gentle} way of speaking.
He gave the baby a {gentle} touch.
A {gentle} breeze cooled the air.
The teacher was {gentle} and patient with students.
examples.source: Öğretmen öğrencilere karşı nazik ve sabırlıydı.

examples.target: The dancer moved in a {graceful} way.
examples.source: Dansçı zarif bir şekilde hareket etti.

examples.target: She handled the situation in a {graceful} manner.
examples.source: Durumu zarif bir şekilde ele aldı.

examples.target: The swan is a {graceful} bird.
He made a {graceful} exit from the stage.
Be careful — that knife is very {sharp}.
examples.source: Dikkatli ol — o bıçak çok keskin.

examples.target: She has a {sharp} mind for business.
examples.source: İş konusunda keskin bir zekası var.

examples.target: The {sharp} turn surprised the driver.
He made a {sharp} observation about the problem.
examples.source: Sorun hakkında keskin bir gözlem yaptı.

examples.target: The meat was cooked until {tender}.
She gave him a {tender} look.
The wound is still {tender}.
He had a {tender} heart despite his stern face.
examples.source: Sert yüzüne rağmen yumuşak bir kalbi vardı.

examples.target: This is a {tough} decision to make.
She is {tough} enough to handle the pressure.
The meat was too {tough} to chew.
He grew up in a {tough} neighborhood.
His answer was too {vague} to be helpful.
examples.source: Cevabı yardımcı olmak için çok belirsizdi.

examples.target: She had a {vague} memory of the event.
The instructions were {vague} and confusing.
He gave only a {vague} hint about his plans.
examples.source: Planları hakkında sadece belirsiz bir ipucu verdi.

examples.target: She had a {vivid} imagination.
The painting used {vivid} colors.
He gave a {vivid} description of the scene.
The dream was so {vivid} it felt real.
examples.source: Rüya o kadar canlıydı ki gerçek gibiydi.

examples.target: She made a {witty} remark that made everyone laugh.
examples.source: Herkesi güldüren nükteli bir yorum yaptı.

examples.target: His {witty} writing attracted many readers.
examples.source: Zekice yazıları pek çok okuyucu çekti.

examples.target: A {witty} reply can defuse tension.
She is known for her {witty} humor.
He was too {stubborn} to admit his mistake.
examples.source: Hatasını kabul etmek için fazla inatçıydı.

examples.target: The {stubborn} stain wouldn't come out.
She can be {stubborn} when she believes she's right.
The {stubborn} mule refused to move.
Despite his fame, he remained {humble}.
She gave a {humble} and sincere apology.
examples.source: Mütevazı ve samimi bir özür diledi.

examples.target: A {humble} attitude earns respect.
He came from a {humble} background.
